### Header:

### Below Header:
- **Sub-navigation tab bar:** Yes, it is present below the header. 
  - Height and text style are not specified in pixels; typically a horizontal width matches with some padding on each side.

  - Text Color: Black (#000000)

### Left Sidebar:
- **Width:** Not explicitly mentioned, but it seems to be fixed and occupies the leftmost part of the screen

### Main Content Area:
- **Background Color:** White (hex #FFFFFF)

### Breadcrumb Area:
- **Background Color:** Light gray or white (hex #FFFFFF)
- **Text Color:** Black (#000000)
- **Position**: Typically at the top of the main content area.

### Filter/Search Bar:
- **Background Color:** Transparent with a light color gradient.
  - Button Colors: Dark blue for text, and dark gray background
  - Input Field Border Color: Dark gray or black (hex #333)

### Table:
- **Header Row Background Color:** Light Gray or White 
- **Header Row Text Color:** Black (#000000)
- **Data Row Background Color:** Light Gray for odd rows, and not specified but usually a different color like white for even rows.
  - Data Row Text Color: Dark gray or black (hex #333)

### Page Title:
- **Style:** Bold font
- **Font Size:** Medium to large size
- **Color:** Black (#000000)
- **Position**: At the top of the main content area, just below the header.

### Bottom Tabs:
- **Background Color:** Light gray or white (hex #FFFFFF) for inactive tabs.
  - Text Color: Black (#000000)

This detailed analysis covers all elements mentioned in your question with precise visual specifications.
